description: CompositionPure black round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and colourful screen print on the frontFitRegularWash careonly hand wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach, wring or tumble dryFlat dry in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorationslee's flair for minimalism is on display in this T-shirt.
